title: Vanilla Defense Expansion
description: A resource pack that adds new defenses, such as shield and armor textures!
body:
**This is not a name dependent resource pack!**

This Resource pack adds new defenses, such as armors and shields! It use the [item model definition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Items_model_definition) to add new items to the game by simply using this command:

**/give @p minecraft:shield[​minecraft:item_model=diamond_shield]**

Any minecraft item will work, I only used diamond_shield as an example, but preferably use shield for custom shields.

Note: Shield banner patterns are limited for custom shields, you cannot apply it on them I'm sorry.

For armors, you would add a additonals definitions to determine the armor model on the player and others! Heres a full example of it:

**/give @p minecraft:diamond_helmet[​minecraft:equippable={slot:"head",equip_sound:"item.armor.equip_diamond",asset_id:"emerald"},minecraft:item_model=emerald_helmet]**

This allows you to display the item model and the model of the armor on the player body (asset_id), you also need to precise on which slot the armor piece will go on (head, chest, legs and feet). And finally, you can add a sound to the armor when it is equipped.

![VDE Guide](https://i.imgur.com/1z2K8MU.png)

Supports Minecraft 1.21.4 and further.

Please do not use this resource pack or modify it for other resource packs without my permission. Thanks!

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85cb0ade26bf39f08b1ade549455a18008eb598b.png)](https://discord.gg/xKAnCYeJhV) [![Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c181c92cf41c653421241f5c17e96c5f9962ea0.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/Enderbod)
